lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It requires significant mechanical repairs and shows heavy wear on the interior and exterior. It is not in reliable running order.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It has some mechanical wear and minor cosmetic issues. The exterior has some scratches and small dents, and the interior shows signs of use.
Mint condition.

Looking for a budget-friendly vehicle that’s ready for the road? This dependable ride is in fair condition, showing some honest wear from its travels, but it still runs steadily and is ready for your next adventure! It’s a functional choice that offers great value for anyone seeking a reliable daily driver.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently maintained. Mechanically, it starts easily and drives well, with a smooth transmission and responsive handling. The exterior is in great shape, showing only minor road wear such as small stone chips consistent with its age. The interior is very clean, with all electronics and climate controls working perfectly. It’s a dependable vehicle that has been well-cared for and is ready for daily use.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs before it can be considered roadworthy. The exterior shows heavy wear, including several large dents and significant rust on the lower panels and wheel wells. Mechanically, the engine is running poorly with a noticeable knock, and the transmission requires immediate attention as it does not shift smoothly. The interior is also in rough shape, with torn upholstery and several non-functional electronic components. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is recommended for someone looking for a major project or a parts donor.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a comprehensive service history and a refined interior, it delivers a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Every mechanical component has been subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and excellence. This is a distinguished example of its class, offering exceptional value for those who demand quality without compromise.

Hey! I'm parting ways with my reliable daily driver and I'd love for it to go to someone who will appreciate it as much as I have. It's in really solid, dependable condition and has plenty of life left in it! It drives like a dream and has been looked after well. I'm looking for a quick, easy sale, so I've priced it to move. Come check it out and let's get you behind the wheel!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Maintenance up to date. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained luxury performance sedan offers an exceptional balance of style and reliability. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like gloss, showing only the minor stone chips expected from careful highway use. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free sanctuary; the premium leather seats are supple with minimal bolstering wear, and every electronic feature—from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection and a recent synthetic oil change. It sits on a set of high-performance tires with plenty of tread remaining and features a smooth-shifting transmission that makes every drive a pleasure. This vehicle comes with a complete service history and a clean title, ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of proven performance and refined aesthetics. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a consistent driving experience backed by a history of mechanical stewardship. An exceptional value proposition for those who demand quality and reliability without compromise.

This professionally curated vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent maintenance and rigorous mechanical standards, it delivers a refined driving experience characterized by both reliability and poise. Our comprehensive multi-point inspection ensures this unit meets our exacting criteria for performance and presentation, offering a sophisticated balance of utility and prestige.

Hey everyone! 👋 I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to own! It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily errands and weekend getaways. It’s been well-loved and is totally ready for its next adventure with a new owner. If you’re looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road, this is the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering linear power delivery up to its 8,400 RPM redline via eight individual throttle bodies. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a well-maintained MacPherson strut front and five-link rear suspension setup. Power is managed through a precise 6-speed manual gearbox and sent to the rear wheels through the M Variable Differential Lock. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service, ensuring the high-revving internal combustion assembly operates within factory tolerances. Finished with the weight-saving carbon fiber roof, this example strikes the ideal balance between raw mechanical feedback and daily drivability.
Used vehicle in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. Firm price.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only minor signs of careful use consistent with its age, such as small stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery is free of tears or significant stains, and all electronic features—from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a documented history of regular oil changes and preventative maintenance. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This is a turn-key car that has been loved and is ready for its next chapter.

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering 333 hp with a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline facilitated by individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a factory M-Variable differential lock for optimal power delivery through the rear wheels. This example is mechanically sound with a recently refreshed VANOS system and reinforced rear subframe mounting points—critical for chassis longevity. Suspension remains taut with OEM-spec dampers and bushings, maintaining the precise turn-in and feedback characteristic of the E46 chassis. While showing light patina consistent with a well-loved driver's car, the compression numbers are strong across all cylinders, and the cooling system has been proactively overhauled.
